zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Vaughan於1400年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾格拉斯波利時，他的父親Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine23歲，母親Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam16歲。他於1412年與Alice Ferch Watkin在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1422年被列為constable of huntingdon castle。他去世於1469年7月26日在英國諾薩普頓史爾享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾金頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Vaughan于1400年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾格拉斯波利时，他的父亲Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine23岁，母亲Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam16岁。他于1412年与Alice Ferch Watkin在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他于1422年被列为constable of huntingdon castle。他去世于1469年7月26日在英国諾薩普頓史爾享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾金頓。

nameMeanings.name: Vaughan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

variants.name: Von
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Veon
meanings: Possibly an altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .

variants.name: Vaughns
meanings: Welsh: variant of Vaughan , with English patronymic -s.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Vaughan was born in 1400, in Glasbury, Breconshire, Wales, his father, Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine, was 23 and his mother, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, was 16. He married Alice Ferch Watkin in 1412, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. In 1422, at the age of 22, his occupation is listed as constable of huntingdon castle. He died on 26 July 1469, in Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Kington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Vaughan est né en 1400, à Glasbury, Breconshire, Galles, son père, Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Alice Ferch Watkin en 1412, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. En 1422, à l’âge de 22 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est constable of huntingdon castle. Il est décédé le 26 juillet 1469, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Kington, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Vaughan 1400 in Glasbury, Breconshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine 23 und seine Mutter Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam 16. Er hat 1412 in Wales, United Kingdom Alice Ferch Watkin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. 1422, als er 22 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als constable of huntingdon castle aufgeführt. Er starb am 26. Juli 1469 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Kington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Vaughan è nato il nel 1400 nel Glasbury, Breconshire, Galles, il suo padre, Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Alice Ferch Watkin nel 1412, nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Nel 1422, all'età di 22 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come constable of huntingdon castle. Morì il 26 luglio 1469, nel Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Kington, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Vaughanが1400年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアグラスブリーで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardineは23歳，母Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gamは16歳であった。1412年にイギリスウェールズでAlice Ferch Watkinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。1422年，22歳の時，職業はconstable of huntingdon castleと記録されている。彼は1469年7月26日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアキントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Vaughan(이)가 1400년 웨일스 브레콘실르 글라스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1412년 영국 웨일스에서 Alice Ferch Watkin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1422년, 22세의 나이로 그의 직업은 constable of huntingdon castle이었다. 그는 1469년 7월 26일 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 킨그턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Vaughan nasceu em 1400, em Glasbury, Breconshire, Gales, seu pai, Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Ferch Watkin em 1412, em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Em 1422, com 22 anos, sua profissão aparece como constable of huntingdon castle. Ele faleceu em 26 de julho de 1469, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Llywarch ap Bran: брэнденбург, крис хилидженбил, остпреуssен, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Vaughan родился в 1400 г. в местности гласбури, брекуншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Ferch Watkin в 1412 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. В 1422 году, в возрасте 22 лет,  он работал по профессии constable of huntingdon castle. Он умер 26 июля 1469 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности кингтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Merthyr Tydfil, County Borough of Merthy: Merthyr Tydfil, Merthyr Tydfil, Gales, Reino Unido
es.Llywarch ap Bran: Brandenburg, Kreis Heiligenbeil, Ostpreußen, Preußen, Alemania
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Vaughan nació en 1400, en Glasbury, Breconshire, Gales, su papá, Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Alice Ferch Watkin en 1412, en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. En 1422, a la edad de 22 años, su ocupación registrada era constable of huntingdon castle. Murió el 26 de julio de 1469, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
